filename: Sales and Distribution - How to get users.xlsx
summary: This deprecated Excel sheet outlines long-term and immediate user acquisition strategies for an elderly care application, focusing on family members (sons/grandsons) and institutions. The content specifically targets the Chilean market, listing Facebook groups and nursing homes in Santiago with mixed English and Spanish notes. It details outreach methods like cold emails, community engagement, and waitlists.
